title: Alexander Bennett All It Takes Work In Progress
description: Wondering when you’ll catch a break? Wondering when the hard work will pay off? This is a (Work in Progress) show for you. Expect songs and strong feelings. Alexander Bennett is a ​Chortle and Leicester Comedy Festival Award nominated comedian. He is the creator and co-host of the award nominated cult podcast Born Yesterday. His solo shows have received rave reviews, been recommended by the British Comedy Guide, featured in The Times Top Jokes of the Edinburgh Fringe and performed on the West End at London's prestigious Soho Theatre. He has been featured in the Guardian, Metro and IPaper and has been heard on BBC Radio 4 and 5 Live.
